content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be slightly left of center but still on track following the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 39 + 5 = 44
Waypoint 44: (6.0793, 2.7734)
Car position: (6.7013, 2.3406)
Bearing = atan2(2.7734 - 2.3406, 6.0793 - 6.7013) = atan2(0.4328, -0.6220)
= 180 - atan2(0.4328, 0.6220) = 180 - 34.8° = 145.2°
Current heading: 125.59°
Delta = 145.2 - 125.59 = 19.61° → left
